content: This product cures all diseases naturally. Doctors don't want you to know.
explanation: Health misinformation is prohibited on EU marketplace under DSA regulations.

content: Join our group to discuss investment strategies and get 300% returns guaranteed.
explanation: Guaranteed investment returns are prohibited financial fraud under US regulations, especially in private messaging recruitment.

content: Traditional herbal remedy passed down for generations. Available in my shop.
explanation: Traditional herbal remedies are culturally accepted and legally sold in APAC marketplaces without medical claims.

content: Selling replica designer handbags, same quality as the original brands.
explanation: Replica/counterfeit goods listings violate marketplace IP policies and US law regardless of stated quality.

content: Our community group is organizing a data privacy awareness workshop next Saturday.
explanation: Legitimate community event post; data privacy advocacy is especially valued in EU context under GDPR awareness culture.
